metadata.scope: schema validity, positive example validation, negative mutation validation, and package-local cross-file reference consistency
metadata.note: Cross-file reference consistency is limited to refs that resolve to package-local example primary ids. Externally anchored refs are informational and not treated as failures here.

referenceConsistencySummary.packageLocalResolvableRefScopeNote: Only refs whose current values resolve to primary ids in package-local example artifacts are checked here.
